meta.name: OGZ Intelligence Layer — Thin Brain
meta.philosophy: Less but right. Cultural guardrails + real metrics + reference examples. No wrong scores, no bad rules.

sacred_occasions.hajj_season: Pull back on promotion. Warm, subtle content only.
sacred_occasions.ramadan: No eating in daylight hours. Suhoor/iftar framing required.

modesty_rules.default: Conservative. Full sleeves, no cleavage, no tight clothing.
modesty_rules.beauty_sector: Product focus on hands/face. Avoid body shots.
modesty_rules.fashion_sector: Modest fashion only. Abaya/hijab styling preferred.

myfitness.sa.voice: The brand communicates in a casual and informative tone, appealing to a broad audience interested in health and wellness. Their messaging is straightforward, focusing on delivering valuable insights without complex jargon.

alromansiahksa.voice: The brand voice of @alromansiahksa is playful and casual, engaging followers with a friendly tone while providing informative content about their offerings. The celebratory tone during special occasions enhances community engagement and brand loyalty.

ounass.voice: Ounass communicates with a blend of playful and informative tones, celebrating fashion and lifestyle through engaging narratives. The bilingual approach enhances accessibility and connects with a diverse audience.

mcdonaldsksa.voice: McDonald's KSA employs a playful and celebratory tone, engaging its audience through interactive content and promotions. The brand effectively uses Arabic to connect with its local audience, making its messaging relatable and appealing.

asteribeautysa.voice: Asteri Beauty embodies an informative and celebratory tone, engaging its audience with a mix of casual and playful language. The brand effectively communicates its beauty expertise while fostering a sense of community and personal connection.

fitnessfirstme.voice: Fitness First ME communicates a vibrant and energetic brand voice that emphasizes community engagement and personal empowerment. Their messaging often combines motivational elements with informative content about fitness and wellness.

OGZ-BEAUTY-Reference-001.voice: The brand communicates in a warm and aspirational tone, blending informative content with a conversational style. This approach resonates well with a diverse audience, particularly in the beauty sector.

levelshoes.voice: Level Shoes communicates with a playful and celebratory tone, blending informative content with a casual approach. The brand emphasizes lifestyle integration and emotional storytelling, appealing to a fashion-forward audience.
signature_phrases: Discover more at the link in our bio

OGZ-F-AND-B-Reference-004.voice: The brand communicates in an informative and aspirational tone, often highlighting the quality and presentation of food experiences. Engaging with the audience through playful and excited language, it effectively showcases the dining atmosphere and culinary offerings.

OGZ-F-AND-B-Reference-005.voice: The brand communicates in a playful and inviting manner, often intertwining patriotic themes with informative content. It engages the audience with relatable questions and calls to action that resonate with local culture.

OGZ-F-AND-B-Reference-009.voice: The brand voice is playful and confident, engaging the audience with witty and exciting content. It effectively uses Najdi Arabic to connect with the local audience, fostering a sense of community and familiarity.

OGZ-F-AND-B-Reference-008.voice: The brand communicates with a warm and bold tone, reflecting a strong sense of national pride and spirituality. Their messaging often emphasizes community and shared experiences, particularly during significant cultural occasions.

aldeebajofficial.voice: Al Deebaj presents a casual yet informative voice, celebrating modest fashion with a professional touch. The brand effectively communicates its offerings while engaging its audience in a relatable manner.

OGZ-F-AND-B-Reference-003.voice: The brand communicates with an excited and celebratory tone, focusing on aspirational messaging that encourages engagement and transactions. The voice is lively and aims to connect with the audience through relatable content.

OGZ-F-AND-B-Reference-002.voice: The brand communicates in a warm and inviting tone, often using playful language to engage its audience. It effectively combines cultural references with product promotions, creating a relatable and exciting atmosphere.

shawarmersa.voice: The brand communicates in a playful and celebratory tone, engaging its audience with interactive content and promotions. The use of Arabic captions and emojis enhances relatability and cultural connection.

noon.voice: Noon's brand voice is vibrant and engaging, often celebrating cultural moments and community involvement. The tone is playful and informative, appealing to a youthful audience with a strong connection to local events.

kuduksa.voice: Kudu's brand voice is playful and celebratory, effectively engaging its audience with a mix of informative and professional tones. The bilingual approach caters to a diverse audience while maintaining a fun and inviting atmosphere.

OGZ-F-AND-B-Reference-039.voice: The brand communicates with a playful and celebratory tone, engaging its audience through casual and warm interactions. It emphasizes community involvement and employee pride, fostering a sense of belonging among its followers.

OGZ-F-AND-B-Reference-038.voice: The brand communicates with a warm and playful tone, focusing on excitement and transactional messages that engage the audience. Their voice resonates well with the local culture, making it relatable and appealing to the Saudi audience.

OGZ-BEAUTY-Reference-002.voice: The brand communicates with a warm and educational tone, focusing on natural ingredients and local pride. Their messaging is aspirational, encouraging consumers to embrace beauty through nature.

roshnksa.voice: ROSHN's brand voice is informative and celebratory, reflecting its commitment to enhancing quality of life through real estate development. The bilingual approach allows it to engage a diverse audience effectively.

OGZ-F-AND-B-Reference-007.voice: The brand communicates in a warm and celebratory tone, engaging its audience with playful and energetic language. It effectively combines Arabic and English to resonate with a diverse audience while maintaining a local flavor.

OGZ-F-AND-B-Reference-006.voice: The brand communicates in a playful and nostalgic tone, often invoking fond memories and emotions related to its products. It engages its audience through interactive content and promotional campaigns, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

barnscoffee.voice: Barns Coffee communicates in a playful and celebratory tone, engaging its audience with casual and informative content. The brand effectively utilizes gamification and contests to foster community interaction and excitement.

prettynature.official.voice: Pretty Nature's brand voice is informative and celebratory, with a playful and casual tone that resonates well with its audience. The content focuses on educating consumers about natural ingredients and skincare routines, fostering a sense of community and engagement.

hmksa.voice: The brand communicates in a casual and approachable manner, primarily using Najdi dialect. The lack of structured language suggests a focus on informal engagement with the audience.

OGZ-F-AND-B-Reference-010.voice: The brand voice is warm and inviting, emphasizing cultural pride and heritage. It engages the audience with a sense of community and nostalgia, creating a welcoming atmosphere for patrons.

OGZ-F-AND-B-Reference-011.voice: The brand communicates with a warm and inviting tone, effectively engaging its audience through playful and appetizing language. The use of colloquial Najdi dialect enhances relatability and connection with local customers.

altazaj_fakieh.voice: The brand voice of Al-Tazaj is playful and celebratory, engaging customers with a casual tone that emphasizes enjoyment and community. It effectively combines informative content with promotional offers, appealing to a wide audience.

pizzahutsaudi.voice: Pizza Hut Saudi Arabia adopts a playful and celebratory tone, engaging customers with informative content about their offerings. The brand emphasizes a casual approach, appealing to a wide audience through relatable language and lively expressions.

maxfashionmena.voice: Max Fashion MENA communicates a vibrant and celebratory tone, blending cultural relevance with modern fashion trends. Their content is engaging and informative, appealing to a diverse audience seeking stylish modest wear.

albaik.voice: Albaik's brand voice is celebratory and informative, effectively engaging its audience with a playful tone. The use of Arabic captions and local references strengthens its connection with the community.

herfyfsc.voice: Herfy's brand voice is playful and celebratory, engaging its audience with a casual tone that evokes nostalgia. The use of emojis and Arabic captions enhances relatability and connection with the audience.

OGZ-RETAIL-Reference-001.voice: The brand communicates with a proud and aspirational tone, emphasizing elegance and tradition in its offerings. It aims to resonate with its audience by showcasing quality and cultural significance in its products.

crumblcookiespr.voice: Crumbl Cookies PR communicates with a playful and celebratory tone, engaging customers through informative content about new dessert offerings. The bilingual approach enhances accessibility and connection with a diverse audience.

aseeb.najd.voice: The brand voice of Aseeb Najd is warm and inviting, celebrating traditional Najdi cuisine while engaging the audience with informative and celebratory tones. The communication is casual yet professional, reflecting a strong connection to cultural heritage.

riyadhfood.voice: The brand voice of @riyadhfood is informative and casual, appealing to food enthusiasts in Riyadh. It combines playful and celebratory tones, making food exploration engaging and accessible.

niceonesa.voice: The brand communicates in an informative and celebratory tone, engaging its audience with playful and casual language. The focus is on beauty and wellness, often incorporating cultural elements.

ramadan.content_approach: Spiritual, community, family, food sharing. Suhoor and iftar moments.

eid_al_fitr.content_approach: Joy, celebration, gifts, sweets, family gatherings.

national_day.content_approach: Green theme, Saudi pride, heritage + modern fusion.

honest_gaps: Beauty sector: only 6% high engagement across 320 obs — intelligence is weak, treat recommendations as experimental
Real estate: only 3% high engagement across 113 obs — almost no usable patterns
Healthcare: only 89 obs — too thin for reliable rules
Reels: only 31 obs — highest engagement format but almost no data
Engagement scoring: brain scores don't match reality for strong brands — DO NOT trust scores alone
Emotion/pillar prescriptions: based on sector averages that fail for individual brands — use brand-level data when available

albaik.high_engagement_style: Conversational Gulf Arabic, pride, urgency, 1-2 sentences, strong emojis
albaik.low_engagement_style: Corporate tone, CSR topics, formal Arabic, 3-4 sentences, weak CTAs
albaik.source: GPT-4o analysis of 51 high + 13 low real captions with verified likes

prescription: Strong CTAs (اطلبوا الآن قبل فوات الأوان!)
pizzahutsaudi.source: GPT-4o comparative analysis against AlBaik winning formula

visual_intelligence.visual_insight: AlBaik uses dramatic studio lighting with bold product focus. PizzaHut uses flat natural lighting with generic lifestyle framing. 190x engagement difference.
